evals.name: pii-sanitization
evals.prompt: Log an error when a user registration fails due to an existing email.
evals.expected_output: Log output that includes a correlation ID but masks the actual email address.

evals.name: zero-trust-entitlement
evals.prompt: Create a service method to delete a project by ID.
evals.expected_output: Check that the requesting user owns the project AND has the 'admin' entitlement for that tenant.
